scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix packages/shared && npm install --prefix apps/api && npm install --prefix apps/admin && npm install --prefix apps/mobile --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.test:preflight-guards: node scripts/preflight-chain-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-real-payment-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-tenant-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-saas-tenant-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-notification-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-release-metadata-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-origin-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-order-worker-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-security-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-backup-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-auth-rate-limit-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-migration-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-rollout-flags-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-result-file-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-env-sync-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-compose-env-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-nginx-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-health-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-monitoring-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-rollback-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-ops-routine-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-build-artifact-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-smoke-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-admin-account-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-admin-role-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-operation-audit-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-export-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-upload-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-operation-setting-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-finance-reconciliation-guard.mjs && node scripts/preflight-agent-settlement-transfer-guard.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:api && npm run build:admin && npm run build:mobile:h5
